arabic_text:
حد عالی
حد دانی
سر
پیر
برتر
کمتر
english_text:
Higher Limit
Lower Limit
Head
Foot
Superior
Inferior
alt_text: Two vertical capsule shapes stacked. The upper capsule, labeled 'حد عالی' (Higher Limit), is marked برتر (Superior) on the side, with 'سر' (Head) at top and 'پیر' (Foot) at bottom. The lower capsule, labeled 'حد دانی' (Lower Limit), is marked کمتر (Inferior). The shape depicts the upper and lower limits of an existential or ontological hierarchy as two oriented bodies.
notes: Illustrates the high/low limit pairing in the chapter on the Seven Intellects. The capsules' head-to-foot orientation conveys directionality of the hierarchy.
